title: manihot urens
intro: Manihot urens, also known as wild cassava or bitter manioc, is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Manihot urens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Manihot urens can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
